issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing configuration or migration failures.
No separate examples section with realistic demonstrations is provided.

scenarios.name: create-table-migration
scenarios.rationale: Response A meets most rubric requirements except the missing command, while Response B also omits the command and uses incorrect column definitions.

scenarios.name: ci-migration-commands
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully meets the rubric by listing the commands and noting they belong in CI, while Response B lists the commands but omits the CI context.
